title: eriogonum longifolium var. gnaphalifolium
intro: Eriogonum longifolium var. gnaphalifolium, also known as California buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum longifolium var. gnaphalifolium include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues.
